meaning: adj.六倍的,六重的,有六部分的
examples: Property and share prices bubbled, rising as much as sixfold.
In some products imports have grown sixfold and prices have fallen by a third.
Its bosses predict that its revenues and passenger Numbers will increase sixfold by 2025.
Its share price has risen sixfold since the beginning of last year (see chart).
In Portland, which brought in a comprehensive programme, cycling levels have increased sixfold since the early 1990s.
